name: Enrage
description: When a unit with the Enrage X keyword has Wound tokens greater than or equal to X, that unit gains the Charge keyword and its unit becomes “-” . If a unit with the Enrage X keyword has Wound tokens greater than or equal to X but removes Wound tokens through an effect so that it has fewer than X, it no longer bene/f_its from the Enrage X keyword until it has Wound tokens greater than or equal to X again.
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Enrage X keyword has Wound tokens greater than or equal to X, that unit gains the Charge keyword and its unit becomes “-” . If a unit with the Enrage X keyword has Wound tokens greater than or equal to X but removes Wound tokens through an effect so that it has fewer than X, it no longer bene/f_its from the Enrage X keyword until it has Wound tokens greater than or equal to X again.
